failures.name: retrieveHybrid - returns lexical fallback when EmbeddingPipeline.isReady is false
failures.error: Test ModeContextRetriever.retrieveHybrid failed with timeout 5000ms — the EmbeddingPipeline mock never resolved isReady to false, so the hybrid path waited for an embedding response that never came.

follow_up: Add fake EmbeddingPipeline that returns isReady=false synchronously to remove the 5s timeout dependency from this suite.
